notes: The older standards-package Phase 2 provides validated machine-readable contracts, not a completed prose standards system.
The component manifest is intentionally broader than the approved mockups.
The package does not claim formal company-wide standards authority unless such standards are supplied later.
Public design systems inform taxonomy, accessibility posture, and documentation structure; this package is not a branded derivative.
The older standards-package Phase 3 authors the core prose standards while preserving the machine-readable token and component contracts.
The mechanical standards-package Phase 3 pass does not prove visual quality, product usefulness, or implementation readiness.
The minimum implementation contract for Vertical Slice 01 is complete under trials/vertical-slice-01/.
Roadmap Phase 2 packet preparation is complete under trials/vertical-slice-01/phase-2/; user upload has not yet occurred.
Roadmap Phase 2 is distinct from the older validated machine-readable-contract Phase 2.
The active gate is Roadmap Phase 3 user-owned Copilot upload and evidence-first trial execution.
Roadmap Phase 3 vertical-slice trial complete: 13/13 blocking acceptance criteria pass with zero manual corrections; see trials/vertical-slice-01/phase-3/phase-3-trial-report.md.
Implementation agent for the trial was Claude (Fable 5) substituting for Microsoft 365 Copilot under product-owner decision PO-1; Copilot-specific behavior remains unmeasured.
Roadmap Phase 4 operational revision complete: routing standard authored (ARCH-ROUTE-001..006), visual-drift prompt completed, qualitative verification checklist added, scaffold banners retired.

Roadmap Phases 5-7 complete 2026-07-06: core library (44 tests, trial reproduced via CLI), Electron workbench (28/28 renderer, 13/13 end-to-end handoff), v0.1 validation review, release notes, and packaging configuration. See product-owner-decision-log.md.

Visual language revision 0.5.0 aligns generated apps with the evolved production workbench: canvas-first composition, restrained containment, integrated title icons, full-row navigation, native file handoff, proportional workflow navigation, and explicit preview placeholders.
